title: alisma plantago-aquatica var. terrestre
intro: Alisma plantago-aquatica var. terrestre, also known as the American water plantain or terrestrial water plantain, is a plant species that belongs to the water plantain family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which have been shown to help alleviate symptoms of edema, urinary disorders, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Alisma plantago-aquatica var. terrestre include its ability to reduce fluid retention, improve kidney function, and soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizome and leaves are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and capsules, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
